'''hasoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicknack|nicknack]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicknack|nicknack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hasoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæseheth|hæseheth]] || [[word:hæsehej|hæsehej]] || [[word:hæsehesh|hæsehesh]] || [[word:hæsehe|hæsehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hasosohoth|hasosohoth]] || [[word:hasosohoj|hasosohoj]] || [[word:hasosohosh|hasosohosh]] || [[word:hasosoho|hasosoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hasohoth|hasohoth]] || [[word:hasohoj|hasohoj]] || [[word:hasohosh|hasohosh]] || [[word:hasoho|hasoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hasofhoth|hasofhoth]] || [[word:hasofhoj|hasofhoj]] || [[word:hasofhosh|hasofhosh]] || [[word:hasofhof|hasofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hasohotho|hasohotho]] || [[word:hasohojo|hasohojo]] || [[word:hasohosho|hasohosho]] || [[word:hasohoko|hasohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hasohoth|hasohoth]] || [[word:hasohoj|hasohoj]] || [[word:hasohosh|hasohosh]] || [[word:hasoho|hasoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hasohothol|hasohothol]] || [[word:hasohojol|hasohojol]] || [[word:hasohoshol|hasohoshol]] || [[word:hasohokol|hasohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hasohothotho|hasohothotho]] || [[word:hasohojojo|hasohojojo]] || [[word:hasohoshosho|hasohoshosho]] || [[word:hasohoko|hasohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hasohothon|hasohothon]] || [[word:hasohojon|hasohojon]] || [[word:hasohoshon|hasohoshon]] || [[word:hasohokon|hasohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hasohothoro|hasohothoro]] || [[word:hasohojoro|hasohojoro]] || [[word:hasohoshoro|hasohoshoro]] || [[word:hasohokoro|hasohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
